50-point CSS polygons from scripts/KF 1.svg … KF 12.svg (viewBox 0 0 960 600).

Regenerate:
  node scripts/svg-to-polygon.mjs "scripts/KF 1.svg" --points 50 --print raw
  (repeat for KF 2 … 12), or loop 1..12 in your shell.

Format per block: filename<TAB>polygon(...)
